info.title: Skylogs API
info.description:
Skylogs backend REST API.

**Frontend quick start**
1. Authenticate via `POST /api/v1/auth/login` and send `Authorization: Bearer {accessToken}` on protected routes.
2. Browse by tag: AlertRule, Endpoints, Users, Teams, Data Sources, Status, etc.
3. Alert rule **create** uses one URL with different bodies — pick the schema via the `type` discriminator on `POST /api/v1/alert-rule`.
4. Public status page data: `GET /api/v1/status/all` (no auth).
5. Webhook tag documents server-to-server callbacks (API token or URL token), not the SPA JWT.

Regenerate after backend changes: `php artisan l5-swagger:generate`

get.description: Returns a paginated list of alert rules visible to the authenticated user. Pinned rules appear first.

parameters.name: alertname
parameters.description: Filter by alert rule name (case-insensitive partial match)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by owner or shared user id

parameters.name: silentStatus
parameters.description: Filter by silence state for the current user

post.description: Creates an alert rule. All types use this endpoint; set `type` to select the request body shape (see schema oneOf / discriminator). Prometheus, Grafana, and PMM additionally use `queryType` (`dynamic` vs `textQuery`).

put.description: Updates an alert rule. Send the payload for the rule's existing type (type cannot be changed). Non-admin users can only update rules they own.

delete.description: Deletes the alert rule for admins/owners, or removes the current user access and endpoints for shared users.

get.summary: Acknowledge alert using login link (system user)

post.summary: Toggle silence for current user on a single alert rule

get.summary: Get selectable endpoints for alert rules
Get history for an alert rule
get.description: Returns paginated state-change history. Shape depends on alert type (API instances, Prometheus/Grafana checks, Elastic/VictoriaLogs checks, etc.).

get.summary: Get triggered/fired alerts for an alert rule
get.description: Returns currently firing data: API `AlertInstance` rows, Prometheus/Grafana alert arrays, Zabbix webhook events, or Elastic/VictoriaLogs check documents depending on type.

200.description: Fired instances or active check payload

get.summary: Get form data for creating an alert rule
Get data sources by type for alert rule creation
Get Zabbix hosts, actions, and severities

post.summary: Silence filtered alert rules for current user
post.description: Uses the same query filters as the alert rule list endpoint.

post.summary: Remove silence from filtered alert rules for current user
Add users, teams, or endpoints to filtered alert rules

get.summary: Get tags for an alert rule

put.summary: Update tags for an alert rule

get.summary: List behavior rules for an alert rule
Get notification endpoints for an alert rule

put.summary: Add notification endpoints to an alert rule

delete.summary: Remove a notification endpoint from an alert rule

post.summary: Send a test notification for an alert rule

get.summary: Get selectable endpoints for batch notification assignment

put.summary: Add endpoints to multiple alert rules

get.summary: Get user and team access data for an alert rule

put.summary: Add users or teams to an alert rule

delete.summary: Remove a user or team from an alert rule

post.summary: Authenticate user and retrieve access token

400.description: Validation error or incorrect current password

get.description: Returns saved config or defaults (`type: main`, empty source URL/token).

get.summary: Check if data source is connected

otpCode.description: For sms, call, email type the otp verification is required

steps.description: For flow type - array of steps with wait and endpoint types

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

201.description: Endpoint created successfully. Response structure varies based on endpoint type.

get.summary: Get endpoints available for flow creation

200.description: Endpoint details. Response structure varies based on endpoint type (sms, email, telegram, flow, etc.)

otpCode.description: For sms, call, email type the otp verification is required if the value updated in process

steps.description: For flow type - array of steps with wait and endpoint types

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

200.description: Endpoint updated successfully. Response structure varies based on endpoint type.

201.description: OTP code has been sent successfully.

message.example: OTP code has been sent to your endpoint

post.summary: Create profile asset and provision alert rules
post.description: Creates alert rules from `config` via ProfileService and stores their ids in `createdAlertRuleIds`.

delete.description: Deletes linked alert rules via ProfileService.

get.summary: Get values for a Prometheus label

post.description: Generates a unique `token` for agent authentication. Owner role only.

delete.description: Also removes related health cluster data. Owner role only.

get.description: No JWT required. Used by public status dashboards.

200.description: Paginated users; each item includes `roles` string array

get.description: Unpaginated list for dropdowns and sharing UI.

delete.description: Reassigns owned endpoints and alert rules to the system admin user. Cannot delete `admin`.

post.summary: Transfer alert rules and endpoints between users
post.description: Owner role only. Moves all alert rules and endpoints from `fromUser` to `toUser`.
Authenticated with API alert token (see `ApiAlertAuth` middleware), not bearer JWT.

schema.description: Alert payload fields depend on integration

post.summary: Stop an API alert (alias of resolve)

AlertRuleState.description: Alert rule state stored in `state` and exposed as `statusLabel` / `status_label` on list and detail responses.

AlertRuleStoreCommonFields.description: Fields shared by every alert rule type on create.

showAcknowledgeBtn.description: Show acknowledge action in notification messages

userIds.description: Additional users granted access (MongoDB user ids)

AlertRuleStoreApi.title: API alert rule
AlertRuleStoreApi.description: Inbound webhook alert (fire, resolve, status). Server generates `apiToken` after create.

enableAutoResolve.description: Automatically resolve firing instances after a period

autoResolveMinutes.description: Minutes until auto-resolve when enableAutoResolve is true

AlertRuleStoreNotification.title: Notification alert rule
AlertRuleStoreNotification.description: Receives generic notification webhooks. Server generates `apiToken` after create.

AlertRuleStorePrometheusDynamic.title: Prometheus (dynamic)
AlertRuleStorePrometheusDynamic.description: Match alerts by external rule name, data sources, and optional label filters.

dataSourceIds.description: Prometheus data source ids (may be empty)

dataSourceAlertName.description: Alert name in the external Prometheus/Grafana ruler

AlertRuleStorePrometheusTextQuery.title: Prometheus (text query)
AlertRuleStorePrometheusTextQuery.description: Evaluate a raw PromQL query object instead of matching external alert names.

queryObject.description: Structured query payload used by the checker

AlertRuleStorePrometheus.description: Prometheus alert rule — choose dynamic or textQuery variant.

AlertRuleStoreGrafana.description: Grafana alert rule — choose dynamic or textQuery variant.

AlertRuleStorePmm.description: Percona PMM alert rule — choose dynamic or textQuery variant.

dataSourceAlertName.description: Sentry project or alert identifier configured in Skylogs

AlertRuleStoreZabbix.title: Zabbix alert rule
AlertRuleStoreZabbix.description: Filter Zabbix webhooks by hosts, actions, and severities (0–5 as strings, or omit for all).

AlertRuleStoreElastic.title: Elastic alert rule
AlertRuleStoreElastic.description: Document-count threshold on an Elastic data view.

AlertRuleStoreVictoriaLogs.title: VictoriaLogs alert rule
AlertRuleStoreVictoriaLogs.description: Log line count threshold on a VictoriaLogs data source.

AlertRuleStoreInput.description: Create alert rule. The `type` field selects the payload shape (same URL for all types).

AlertRuleUpdateCommonFields.description: Fields that can be updated on any alert rule type.

AlertRuleUpdateInput.description: Update alert rule. Send the variant that matches the rule's existing type (type cannot be changed via this endpoint).

sourceUrl.description: Parent Skylogs URL when type is agent

sourceToken.description: Parent cluster token when type is agent

Endpoint.description: Endpoint model with different structures based on type. The structure varies depending on the endpoint type (sms, email, telegram, flow, etc.)

value.description: Primary value (phone number, email address, etc.) - used for most types except telegram and flow

chatId.description: Chat ID for telegram type endpoints

threadId.description: Thread ID for telegram type endpoints

botToken.description: Bot token for telegram type endpoints

steps.description: Steps array for flow type endpoints

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

userId.description: User ID who owns this endpoint

EndpointInput.description: Input schema for creating/updating endpoints. Structure varies based on type.

value.description: Primary value (phone number, email address, etc.) - required for most types

chatId.description: Chat ID for telegram type endpoints

threadId.description: Thread ID for telegram type endpoints

botToken.description: Bot token for telegram type endpoints

steps.description: Steps array for flow type endpoints

type.description: Step type - wait for delay or endpoint for notification

timeUnit.description: Time unit for wait type steps (seconds, minutes, hours)

endpointIds.description: Array of endpoint IDs for endpoint type steps

token.description: Agent auth token (omitted in list/all responses)

tags.description: Non-empty array of tag names to aggregate alerts

tags.name: AlertRule
tags.description: Manage alert rules, notifications, access, tags, and behavior rules

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: JWT-based authentication endpoints for Skylogs API

tags.name: ConfigSkylogs
tags.description: Skylogs cluster mode: main server or agent linked to a parent. Owner role only.

tags.name: ConfigTelegram
tags.description: Telegram bot proxy configuration (HTTP/SOCKS5). Owner role only. Only one config can be active at a time.

tags.name: Data Sources
tags.description: Manage monitoring data sources (Prometheus, Grafana, Sentry, etc.)

tags.name: Endpoints
tags.description: Manage notification endpoints (SMS, Email, Telegram, Teams, etc.)

tags.name: ProfileAsset
tags.description: Profile assets: bundled alert-rule templates applied for a user. Owner role only.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus helper endpoints for alert-rule UI (rules, labels, fired alerts). Prefer `/alert-rule/create-data/*` when building create forms.

tags.name: SkylogsInstance
tags.description: Remote Skylogs cluster instances used for health monitoring. CRUD requires owner role; `all` and `status` are available to any authenticated user.

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Status pages grouped by tags with aggregated alert counts. Requires owner or manager for CRUD.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User accounts and roles (owner, manager, member). Manager/owner routes require elevated roles.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Inbound integrations (no JWT). API alerts use `apiToken` header; external systems use webhook tokens in the URL path.
